brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Bronze zone ingest of NCES CIP-to-SOC crosswalk (CIP 2020 x SOC 2018). Downloads XLSX from NCES, parses CIP-SOC sheet via openpyxl, coerces CIP codes from float to XX.XXXX string format, coerces SOC codes to string, strips whitespace from title fields, skips rows with null cipcode/soc_code, adds framework metadata (ingested_at, source_url, source_method, load_date), and lands 6,097 rows in raw.cip_soc_crosswalk. Includes 194 'no match' rows (SOC 99-9999) preserved for Silver filtering.

documentation.description: Ingest the NCES CIP 2020 to SOC 2018 crosswalk XLSX into the Bronze zone. Downloads from NCES (with local fallback), parses the CIP-SOC sheet using openpyxl, maps 4 source columns (CIP2020Code, CIP2020Title, SOC2018Code, SOC2018Title) to canonical names (cipcode, cip_title, soc_code, soc_title), coerces CIP codes from openpyxl float representation to XX.XXXX string format with zero-padding, preserves SOC codes as XX-XXXX strings, strips whitespace from title fields, and adds framework metadata fields.

fields.name: CIP2020Code
fields.description: CIP code, may arrive as float (52.0201) or string from openpyxl

fields.name: cipcode
fields.transformation: DERIVED: CIP2020Code coerced from float/string to XX.XXXX via _coerce_cipcode(). Float 52.0201 -> '52.0201', int 1 -> '01.0000', string with dot gets zero-padded family (2 chars) and detail (4 chars)

fields.name: cip_title
fields.transformation: DIRECT: CIP2020Title stripped of whitespace via _coerce_string()

fields.name: soc_code
fields.transformation: DIRECT: SOC2018Code stripped of whitespace, preserved as XX-XXXX string

fields.name: soc_title
fields.transformation: DIRECT: SOC2018Title stripped of whitespace via _coerce_string()

fields.name: ingested_at
fields.transformation: FRAMEWORK: current UTC timestamp at ingest time

fields.name: load_date
fields.transformation: FRAMEWORK: current date at ingest time

brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Silver zone transformation of CIP-SOC crosswalk. Reads 6,097 rows from raw.cip_soc_crosswalk, filters 194 'no match' rows (soc_code = '99-9999'), validates CIP format (XX.XXXX regex) and SOC format (XX-XXXX regex), validates SOC major group against 23-value allowlist, derives cip_family (first 2 chars of cipcode) and soc_major_group (first 2 chars of soc_code), performs cross-table lookups against 3 Silver tables (base.college_scorecard for has_scorecard_match on cipcode, base.bls_ooh for has_bls_match on soc_code, base.onet_occupations for has_onet_match on bls_soc_code), derives match_quality from 5-tier CASE logic, computes deterministic record_id via compute_grain_id with 'xw' prefix on cipcode+soc_code grain, and promotes 5,903 rows to base.cip_soc_crosswalk via idempotent promote pattern.

documentation.description: Transform raw CIP-SOC crosswalk from Bronze into clean, modeled Silver base table. Filters out 194 'no match' sentinel rows (soc_code = '99-9999'), validates CIP format against XX.XXXX regex and SOC format against XX-XXXX regex (rows failing validation are skipped with warning), validates SOC major group against 23-value VALID_SOC_MAJOR_GROUPS frozenset, derives cip_family and soc_major_group classification fields, performs set-membership lookups against 3 Silver reference tables to compute cross-table match flags, derives match_quality from exhaustive 5-tier CASE expression (full, partial_no_onet, partial_no_bls, scorecard_only, no_scorecard), computes deterministic record_id via grain hash on cipcode+soc_code with 'xw' prefix, and promotes via idempotent append with dedup on record_id.

fields.name: cipcode
fields.description: Used for has_scorecard_match lookup via set membership

fields.name: soc_code
fields.description: Used for has_bls_match lookup via set membership

fields.name: bls_soc_code
fields.description: Used for has_onet_match lookup via set membership

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash computed via compute_grain_id(record, ['cipcode', 'soc_code'], prefix='xw'). SHA-256 of concatenated grain fields with 'xw' prefix. Uses the already-transformed record dict, so the hash is based on the validated cipcode and soc_code values.

cipcode.transformationDescription: Stripped whitespace via str().strip(), then validated against XX.XXXX regex pattern (_CIP_PATTERN). Rows failing validation are skipped with warning. No value mutation beyond strip().

cip_title.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze via raw.get('cip_title', ''). Empty string as defensive fallback for None.

cip_family.transformationDescription: First 2 characters of cipcode extracted via cipcode[:2]. Yields the 2-digit CIP family code (e.g., '52' from '52.0201'). Matches base.college_scorecard.cip_family for downstream joins.

soc_code.transformationDescription: Stripped whitespace via str().strip(), then validated against XX-XXXX regex pattern (_SOC_PATTERN). Rows with soc_code = '99-9999' are filtered before this step. Rows failing validation are skipped with warning. No value mutation beyond strip().

soc_title.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze via raw.get('soc_title', ''). Empty string as defensive fallback for None.

soc_major_group.transformationDescription: First 2 characters of soc_code extracted via soc_code[:2]. Yields the 2-digit SOC major group code (e.g., '11' from '11-1021'). Validated against VALID_SOC_MAJOR_GROUPS frozenset of 23 codes. Rows with invalid major group are skipped with warning. Matches base.bls_ooh.soc_major_group for downstream joins.

has_scorecard_match.transformationDescription: Boolean flag: True if cipcode exists in the set of distinct cipcode values loaded from base.college_scorecard via _load_scorecard_cips(). Set-membership lookup (Python 'in' operator on set). If base.college_scorecard table does not exist, all values default to False.

has_bls_match.transformationDescription: Boolean flag: True if soc_code exists in the set of distinct soc_code values loaded from base.bls_ooh via _load_bls_socs(). Set-membership lookup (Python 'in' operator on set). If base.bls_ooh table does not exist, all values default to False.

has_onet_match.transformationDescription: Boolean flag: True if soc_code exists in the set of distinct bls_soc_code values loaded from base.onet_occupations via _load_onet_socs(). Set-membership lookup (Python 'in' operator on set). If base.onet_occupations table does not exist, all values default to False.

match_quality.transformationDescription: Derived from has_scorecard_match, has_bls_match, has_onet_match via derive_match_quality() implementing exhaustive 5-tier CASE: (1) not has_scorecard -> 'no_scorecard', (2) all three True -> 'full', (3) scorecard+bls but not onet -> 'partial_no_onet', (4) scorecard+onet but not bls -> 'partial_no_bls', (5) scorecard only -> 'scorecard_only'. Validated against VALID_MATCH_QUALITIES frozenset.

source_load_date.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'load_date' to 'source_load_date'. Preserves the Bronze zone ingest date. No value transformation.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: UTC timestamp generated at Silver transformation time via datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.timezone.utc). Independent of Bronze ingested_at.

source_url.reason: Raw metadata field not needed in Silver zone. Contains the NCES download URL used during Bronze ingestion.

source_method.reason: Raw metadata field not needed in Silver zone. Contains 'xlsx_download' fetch method identifier from Bronze ingestion.

filteredRows.description: 194 rows filtered where soc_code = '99-9999' (NCES 'no match' sentinel indicating CIP codes with no corresponding SOC occupation). These are CIP programs that the crosswalk explicitly designates as not career-oriented (e.g., Liberal Arts).
